summary: Current-HEAD implementation and regression coverage are sound, and the previous stale-HEAD issue is remediated. However, two verification records name commands different from those recorded in their artifacts, so gate evidence provenance is not yet reliable.
inspection_summary: Inspected current HEAD abc29a0, CLI dispatch and entrypoint, focused subprocess regression, Story/Architecture/Spec and Design SSOT, verification artifacts, bounded PR summaries, and current pr-prepare state; reran the focused init tests successfully.
judgment_delta: The stale-HEAD concern is resolved by four strict-head records at abc29a0.
The implementation coverage concern is resolved by exact-output, read-only, negative-path, alias, and normal-init assertions.
The final status changed to needs_changes because two verification commands conflict with their supporting artifact commands.

findings.detail: The e2e and integration verification records do not use the exact commands stored in their supporting artifacts. Re-record both entries, regenerate PR artifacts, and re-dispatch review.
